vocab.example: I am deeply moved by the architectural heritage in Europe, which offers a stark contrast to the modern skylines of my home country.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp lôi cuốn kỳ lạ (từ nơi xa xôi)
vocab.example: Traveling abroad allows me to witness landscapes with an exotic charm that I simply cannot find in my local vicinity.

vocab.meaning: sự đan xen văn hóa đa dạng (ví von như một tấm thảm)
vocab.example: Every view in a foreign land is part of a broader cultural tapestry that enriches my understanding of the world.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thân thuộc, gần gũi như ở nhà
vocab.example: Despite the grandeur of foreign vistas, the emerald rice fields in my country provide a homely feel that is irreplaceable.
I love exploring domestic hidden gems where you can stumble upon breathtaking views that aren't yet on the tourist map.

vocab.meaning: cảm giác thuộc về một nơi nào đó
vocab.example: There is a profound sense of belonging I experience when looking at the familiar mountains of my homeland.

vocab.meaning: sự tương phản đến ngạt thở (cực kỳ ấn tượng)
vocab.example: The breathtaking contrast between the neon-lit streets of Tokyo and the quiet temples of my country is what makes international travel so rewarding.

vocab.meaning: sự đa dạng về địa lý
vocab.example: My country boasts incredible geographical diversity, ranging from limestone karsts to expansive coastal plains.

vocab.meaning: để lại ấn tượng sâu đậm/lâu dài
vocab.example: The alpine views in Switzerland certainly leave a lasting impression, but I still harbor a deep affection for the landscapes of my birth.

vocab.meaning: vẻ đẹp vô song/không gì sánh bằng
vocab.example: While foreign cities are impressive, the unrivalled beauty of my country's natural heritage remains my top preference.
